## Windows security warning

These release assets are currently unsigned, so Windows may show a SmartScreen warning before launch, even when downloaded from the official GitHub Releases page. The app is free and open source, but code signing for Windows releases is a paid requirement. If you trust the release, use **More info** -> **Run anyway**.

## Code signing status

SignPath integration is prepared in this repository, but these assets were published before the SignPath configuration was fully enabled.
